get_started: Building interfaces that respect your time.
intro: Software engineer and product designer. I specialize in bringing clarity to complex systems through deliberate design and robust engineering.

explore.title: Concepts, systems, and product experiments.
explore.description: A space for collected ideas, interface studies, and engineering notes that connect strategy, usability, and implementation detail.

gallery.title: Factory.app
gallery.subtitle: Online tools for fabricators to create orders, collaborate on work, schedule jobs and track time from one location.

items.title: Clarity over cleverness
items.body: An interface should explain itself. If it needs a tutorial, it's broken. I focus on removing cognitive load so users can do their actual work.

items.title: Systems thinking
items.body: A button is never just a button. It's part of a state machine, an API boundary, and a design language. I build full vertical slices.

items.title: Crafted details
items.body: The difference between good and great is a hundred tiny details. Micro-interactions, perfect typography, and zero layout shift.

items.title: Quiet execution
items.body: No unnecessary animations. No scrolljacking. Just fast, accessible, and resilient applications that respect the user's platform.
